infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: TitraHealth reads your steps, heart rate, HRV, sleep, weight, blood glucose, and nutrition from Apple Health to display health trends alongside your medication journey.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: TitraHealth saves your logged weight and nutrition data to Apple Health to keep your health records in sync.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TitraHealth uses your camera to photograph food for nutritional analysis.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: TitraHealth uses your microphone to log food, activity, and health entries by voice.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: TitraHealth sends reminders to help you stay on track with logging.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TitraHealth accesses your photo library to select food images for nutritional analysis.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: TitraHealth reads your steps, heart rate, HRV, sleep, weight, blood glucose, and nutrition from Apple Health to display health trends alongside your medication journey.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: TitraHealth saves your logged weight and nutrition data to Apple Health to keep your health records in sync.
